title: OS Harness Component Contract
description: The co-located contract a component conforms to (governance/decisions/component-model.md): input/output/exit + reads/writes + triggers + config. `reads`/`writes` are the write-zone declaration the write hooks (Gate #2, governance/decisions/enforcement-points.md) enforce at write time. One contract.json per non-planned component; validated against this schema by the doctor.

type.description: The canonical component type = its folder under harness/.

role.description: Derived role: agent | command | query | store.

definition.description: Pointer to the governance-side definition (e.g. an agent's law).

writes.description: The tables/paths this component is the SOLE writer of — the declaration Gate #2 enforces.
